commit.message:
Add trading_accounts synced table from MySQL v_ant_broker_user

- DDL: 27 columns, PK trading_account_id, indexes on last_update/assigned_to/enable
- Source: v_ant_broker_user LEFT JOIN v_ant_users (real accounts only, no demo, no test groups)
- Incremental: filter on bu.last_update_time >= cutoff
- Full sync: chunked generator via SSDictCursor (safe for large tables)
- Routes: POST /sync/trading-accounts, POST /sync/trading-accounts/full
- Scheduler: hourly incremental with 24h lookback
- Data Sync page: Total Accounts, Enabled Accounts, Total Balance, Total Equity
- trade_group used instead of group (reserved SQL keyword)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v1.28.3: Sanitize IB float sentinels in commission reports

IB uses sys.float_info.max (~1.8e308) as "not available" for realizedPNL
and commission fields. This sentinel was logged as a 300+ digit number and
persisted to position_store. Added _sanitize_ib_float() to replace any
value > 1e300 with None at the source (commissionReport callback and
updatePortfolio). Updated log formatters to handle None gracefully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add blank lines before --- separators to prevent Setext heading parsing

In Markdown, a line of --- immediately after text is interpreted as a
Setext-style h2 heading, not a horizontal rule. Adding a blank line
before each --- ensures they render as <hr> separators.

commit.message:
fix: security hardening, performance optimizations, and dark mode dialog styling

Security:
- Migrate token storage from localStorage to Capacitor Preferences (native)
- Add HTTPS enforcement in production builds
- Add UUID validation on noteId file path operations
- Gate sensitive console.log calls behind import.meta.env.DEV
- Add input length validation on note titles and summaries

Performance:
- Wrap RecordingContext, NotesContext, SettingsContext values with useMemo
- Add stateRef pattern for stable callbacks in RecordingContext
- Lazy load all page routes with React.lazy + Suspense
- Memo MarkdownContent to avoid re-parsing unchanged content
- Extract constant arrays in RecordingUI to avoid per-render allocation
- Fix duplicate setState + liveActivity calls in resumeRecording

UI:
- Fix dark mode styling for IonAlert and IonSelect dialogs
- Add stepped Ionic color variables for proper overlay contrast
- Style destructive/cancel button colors in alerts
- Fix alert input field styling for rename dialog in dark mode
- Handle empty API response in notes list (show empty state, not error)
- Handle empty response body in API request function

Switch transliteration model to gemini-3-flash-preview

Flash-lite was unreliable at preserving line-by-line structure —

consistently faithful (1.00 ratio) at ~50% more cost per page
($0.0007 vs $0.0005), which is negligible.

commit.message:
Fix SWDA ATH: drop 5yr monthly history, use fiftyTwoWeekHigh only

5-year monthly closes from Yahoo Finance contained a spurious data point
(~12,838 GBp) that inflated the displayed ATH to £128.38.

fiftyTwoWeekHigh from the response meta already matches the broker's
"1Y High" exactly and requires no historical data fetch. Simplified
qSWDA() to use interval=1d&range=1d (same as all other symbols).

commit.message:
refactor: профессиональный рефакторинг и дебаг install.sh

Безопасность:
- fix: SQL injection в PANEL_PATH — параметризованный запрос sqlite3
- fix: curl без --fail при загрузке 3X-UI — теперь скачиваем в tempfile с -fsSL
- fix: пароль больше не выводится в консоль (только в файл 600)

Надёжность:
- fix: ufw enable || true — не падаем если UFW уже включён
- fix: xargs -r в backup — не запускать rm на пустом input
- fix: SERVER_IP fallback — починена сломанная логика ||
- fix: PUBLIC_KEY теперь тоже валидируется после генерации
- fix: trap INT/TERM — очистка /tmp/x-ui-cookie.txt при прерывании
- fix: polling готовности API вместо двойного sleep 5

Рефакторинг (устранение дублирования):
- refactor: generate_x25519_keys() — парсинг ключей вынесен в функцию
- refactor: get_ssl_cert() — два идентичных certbot-вызова → функция
- refactor: create_inbound() — создание inbound через API вынесено в функцию
- refactor: /etc/nginx/snippets/vpn-ssl.conf — общий SSL-сниппет для vhosts
- refactor: два идентичных location-блока объединены в один (^~)
- refactor: LOGIN_OK флаг — LOGIN_RESP не парсится дважды
- refactor: find заменён на прямую проверку известных путей + fallback find
- refactor: TS в watchdog вычисляется в момент записи, не при старте
- refactor: grep+awk → awk для парсинга xray output
- refactor: валидация домена через regex перед установкой

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Send hero image on ALL repair attempts (was: first only). On repairs, also send
  rendered SVG for side-by-side visual comparison ("Image 1 = target, Image 2 = your output").
- Deduplicate heroImagePrompt in generate-unified route (was duplicated in
  enrichedDescription AND interfaceDefinition).
- Vision scorer accepts reference image for image-vs-image comparison (much more
  accurate than text-vs-image).
- Raise vision repair threshold from 5 → 7 when hero image exists.
- Add diagnostic logging for prompt stats (image size, system prompt chars, path selection).

implement phase 0-4: full ragdoll physics fighting game skeleton

- OrbitCamera: RMB drag + scroll (macOS), one-finger + pinch (iOS)
- CameraRig: auto-follows midpoint, auto-zooms to keep both fighters in frame
- AIBrain: Easy/Medium/Hard heuristic AI (random/blended/strategy)
- AIHeuristics: IsOffBalance, DirectionToOpponent, GetDominantArm, IsInStrikingRange
- ScriptableObjects: JointStateConfig, RagdollConfig, MatchRules, SoundBank
- Packages/manifest.json: InputSystem, URP, TextMeshPro
- ProjectSettings: gravity (0,-15,0), solver iterations 20/10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add CommandDouble.record() API with coordinator-based recording (#159)

* feat(command_double): add .record() method for automatic passthrough recording

- Introduce record() method on CommandDouble to enable fluent API for recording passthrough invocations to fixture files.
- Enforce that record() must be called after passthrough(); raises ValueError otherwise.
- Integrate recording in PassthroughCoordinator.finalize_result() to capture passthrough results into the recording session.
- Add _finalize_recording_sessions() in CmdMox called during verify() to finalize and persist all recording sessions.
- Add comprehensive unit and BDD tests covering recording API, integration, and error cases.
- Update documentation and roadmap to reflect new recording capability.

This feature allows seamless capturing of external command invocations with automatic fixture persistence, improving test mocking workflows.

Co-authored-by: devboxerhub[bot] <devboxerhub[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(controller): ensure verification cleanup runs despite recording errors

Protect _finalize_verification() execution in CmdMox.verify() when _finalize_recording_sessions() raises. Previously, an exception from recording finalization would prevent IPC server shutdown and environment restoration. Now, recording errors are caught, _finalize_verification() runs regardless, and errors re-raised afterwards. Added a test to verify cleanup despite recording finalization failures.

Co-authored-by: devboxerhub[bot] <devboxerhub[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Harden recording infrastructure and update stale docs

- Add threading.Lock to RecordingSession.record() so that
  concurrent passthrough completions on separate IPC threads
  produce correct, gap-free sequence numbers.
- Add RecordingSession.is_started public property and use it in
  BDD step definitions instead of accessing private _started_at.
- Remove isinstance check on _recording_session from BDD steps,
  relying on the existing has_recording_session public property.
- Update design doc section 9.8.1 to reflect per-double recording
  via getattr() instead of stale constructor-parameter approach.
- Fix class diagram: PassthroughCoordinator no longer owns a
  _recording_session attribute; it inspects the double's session.
- Clarify usage-guide persistence timing: fixtures are written
  only when verify() is called (or via verify_on_exit=True).
- Replace undefined my_scrubber in usage-guide example with a
  concrete RedactSecrets implementation.
- Add make nixie to execplan 7-1-2 validation steps; fix
  "re-running" phrasing.
- Add post-merge retrospective note to execplan 7-1-3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add CommandDouble.recording_session public property

Expose _recording_session via a read-only property so that BDD
step definitions and external consumers can access the attached
RecordingSession without reaching into private state.

Update BDD step session_is_started to use the new public
recording_session property and RecordingSession.is_started
instead of accessing _recording_session and _started_at directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Guard record() against overwriting active session and clean up tests

Raise RuntimeError if record() is called when a recording session
is already attached, preventing silent loss of buffered recordings.

Refactor unit tests: access recording session through the public
recording_session property instead of _recording_session, use
is_started instead of _started_at, and consolidate three identical
record-raises tests into a single parametrized test over spy/stub/
mock double kinds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Harden recording lifecycle and improve test encapsulation

Swap verify() finalizer order so _finalize_verification() (which stops
the IPC server) runs before _finalize_recording_sessions(), preventing
in-flight passthrough completions from racing with session finalization.
Both finalizers always run; the first error encountered is surfaced.

Move lifecycle validation in RecordingSession.record() inside the lock
and wrap finalize()'s snapshot/flag-set in the same lock so a concurrent
finalize() cannot interleave between the _finalized check and append.

Replace private-attribute assertions in test_command_double_record.py
with behaviour-based tests that exercise recording through the public
API and assert on persisted fixture output.

Update execplan slot list to include _recording_session and reformat
docs via project mdformat rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: place_of_supply always set from customer GSTIN, not overridden by India Compliance

Root cause: update_invoice() never set customer_address on the invoice doc, so
India Compliance's before_validate_transaction hook ran during save() and computed
place_of_supply from company_gstin (Punjab/03) instead of the customer GSTIN.
submit_invoice() then saw place_of_supply already populated and skipped its fix.

Changes:
- update_invoice(): set place_of_supply via our gst_tax.get_place_of_supply()
  BEFORE save(), so India Compliance's hook sees it already set and does not
  override it
- submit_invoice(): remove the "if not already set" guard — always recalculate
  to correct any stale value the draft may be carrying

commit.message:
Add --stealth mode to browser CLI for Cloudflare bypass (#53)

* Add --stealth mode to browser CLI for Cloudflare bypass

Integrates anti-detection features directly into the existing browser tool
instead of requiring a separate stealth-browser CLI:

- 60+ stealth Chrome args from Scrapling applied on launch
- Harmful automation-leaking args removed (--enable-automation, etc.)
- Cloudflare Turnstile solver runs automatically after navigation
- --no-cf-solve flag to skip CF solving on specific navigations
- Stealth state persisted in session so all commands are aware

Replaces the approach from PR #53 (separate stealth-browser Python CLI)
with a single --stealth flag on the existing tool, keeping all 30 commands
available in stealth mode.

Fix onboarding summary parsing when closing marker is absent

extractOnboardingSummary() required [/ONBOARDING_SUMMARY] to be present.
If Dify doesn't output it, the function returned null and the full raw
response (JSON block included) was displayed as chat text.

Now treats the closing marker as optional — if absent, parses everything
after the opening marker as JSON. Added 2 new tests covering this path.
